glosses.es: policía de investigación criminal; policía judicial
glosses.pt: polícia de investigação criminal; polícia judiciária
glosses.vi: cảnh sát hình sự; cảnh sát điều tra

sentences.target: Mein Bruder arbeitet bei der Kriminalpolizei.

translations.de: Mein Bruder arbeitet bei der Kriminalpolizei.
translations.en: My brother works for the criminal police.
translations.es: Mi hermano trabaja en la policía judicial.
translations.fr: Mon frère travaille à la police judiciaire.
translations.it: Mio fratello lavora nella polizia giudiziaria.
translations.ru: Мой брат работает в уголовном розыске.
translations.pt: Meu irmão trabalha na polícia civil.
translations.vi: Anh tôi làm ở cảnh sát hình sự.
translations.nl: Mijn broer werkt bij de recherche.
translations.uk: Мій брат працює в карному розшуку.
translations.hu: A testvérem a bűnügyi rendőrségnél dolgozik.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई क्राइम ब्रांच में काम करता है।
translations.pl: Mój brat pracuje w wydziale kryminalnym.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου δουλεύει στην Ασφάλεια.
translations.id: Kakak saya bekerja di reserse kriminal.
translations.ro: Fratele meu lucrează la Poliția Judiciară.
translations.ja: 兄は刑事課で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Bruder'; masc nominative singular; 1st person singular possessor.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; subject of 'arbeitet'.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; finite predicate.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a workplace/location PP.
Definite article; feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Kriminalpolizei'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'bei'.

sentences.target: Die Kriminalpolizei klingelt gerade an unserer Tür.
sentences.reading: /diː kʁimiˈnaːlpoliˈt͡saɪ̯ ˈklɪŋəlt ɡəˈʁaːdə an ˈʊnzəʁɐ tyːɐ̯./

translations.de: Die Kriminalpolizei klingelt gerade an unserer Tür.
translations.ipa: /diː kʁimiˈnaːlpoliˈt͡saɪ̯ ˈklɪŋəlt ɡəˈʁaːdə an ˈʊnzəʁɐ tyːɐ̯./
translations.en: The criminal police are ringing at our door.
translations.es: La policía judicial está tocando el timbre de nuestra puerta.
translations.fr: La police judiciaire sonne à notre porte.
translations.it: La polizia giudiziaria sta suonando al nostro campanello.
translations.ko: 형사과 경찰이 우리 집 초인종을 누르고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 刑警正在按我们家的门铃。
translations.yue: 刑事部啲人喺我哋門口撳鐘。
translations.ru: Сотрудники уголовного розыска звонят в нашу дверь.
translations.pt: A polícia civil está tocando a nossa campainha.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát hình sự đang bấm chuông cửa nhà tôi.
translations.nl: De recherche belt aan bij ons.
translations.uk: Працівники карного розшуку дзвонять у наші двері.
translations.hu: A bűnügyi rendőrök épp csengetnek az ajtónknál.
translations.hi: क्राइम ब्रांच वाले हमारे दरवाज़े की घंटी बजा रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Policjanci z wydziału kryminalnego dzwonią do naszych drzwi.
translations.el: Άνδρες της Ασφάλειας χτυπούν το κουδούνι μας.
translations.id: Petugas reserse kriminal sedang menekan bel di pintu kami.
translations.ro: Poliția Judiciară sună la ușa noastră.
translations.cs: Kriminálka právě zvoní u našich dveří.
translations.ja: 刑事課の人がうちの玄関のチャイムを鳴らしている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of 'klingelt'.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; denotes ringing.
Temporal adverb modifying 'klingelt' (ongoing action).
Preposition governing dative (static location); heads the PP 'an unserer Tür'.
Possessive determiner; dative feminine singular; modifies 'Tür'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'an'.

sentences.target: Ich muss mit der Kriminalpolizei sprechen.

translations.de: Ich muss mit der Kriminalpolizei sprechen.
translations.en: I need to speak with the criminal police.
translations.es: Necesito hablar con la policía judicial.
translations.fr: Je dois parler à la police judiciaire.
translations.it: Devo parlare con la polizia giudiziaria.
translations.yue: 我需要同刑事部嘅人傾下。
translations.ru: Мне нужно поговорить с уголовным розыском.
translations.pt: Eu preciso falar com a polícia civil.
translations.he: אני צריך לדבר עם המשטרה הפלילית.
translations.vi: Tôi cần nói chuyện với cảnh sát hình sự.
translations.ar: أحتاج أن أتحدث مع الشرطة الجنائية.
translations.nl: Ik moet met de recherche praten.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно поговорити з карним розшуком.
translations.hi: मुझे क्राइम ब्रांच से बात करनी है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να μιλήσω με την Ασφάλεια.
translations.id: Saya perlu berbicara dengan reserse kriminal.
translations.ro: Trebuie să vorbesc cu Poliția Judiciară.
translations.ja: 刑事課と話す必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary; 1st person singular present indicative; selects infinitive 'sprechen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the interlocutor PP.
Definite article; feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Kriminalpolizei'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'mit'.
Main verb; bare infinitive complement of the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Er hat die Kriminalpolizei sofort informiert.

translations.de: Er hat die Kriminalpolizei sofort informiert.
translations.en: He informed the criminal police immediately.
translations.es: Avisó a la policía judicial de inmediato.
translations.fr: Il a prévenu la police judiciaire immédiatement.
translations.it: Ha informato subito la polizia giudiziaria.
translations.ru: Он сразу сообщил в уголовный розыск.
translations.pt: Ele avisou a polícia civil imediatamente.
translations.tr: O, asayiş şubesine hemen haber verdi.
translations.vi: Anh ấy báo cho cảnh sát hình sự ngay lập tức.
translations.nl: Hij heeft de recherche meteen ingelicht.
translations.hi: उसने तुरंत क्राइम ब्रांच को सूचित किया।
translations.nb: Han informerte kriminalpolitiet med en gang.
translations.id: Dia segera memberi tahu reserse kriminal.
translations.ro: El a anunțat imediat Poliția Judiciară.
translations.da: Han underrettede Kriminalpolitiet med det samme.
translations.ja: 彼はすぐに刑事課に連絡した。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; forms the present perfect with 'informiert'.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'informiert'.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates immediacy.
Past participle of the main verb; head of the participial construction with auxiliary 'hat' (present perfect).
